headline: Natural Gas Looks Ready to Rebound. Cheniere and Expand Energy Should Benefit.
summary: If the current trend holds, natural gas and related assets may reverse course and regain ground in the weeks ahead.

raw.headline: Natural Gas Looks Ready to Rebound. Cheniere and Expand Energy Should Benefit.

headline: Oil Above $90, Pump Above $4 — And 7 Energy Stocks Still Trading At A Wide Discount
summary: Oil surged 38% from its pre-war level of $65, gas jumped from $2.98 to $4.09, and Kpler data shows Hormuz flows are still severely disrupted. Yet seven major energy stocks still price in a resolution that hasn't arrived — trading at 7x to 11x forward P/E. Is this a generational buying opportunity, or a value trap?

headline: Extendicare Debt Overhaul Reshapes Risk Profile After Strong Share Run
summary: Extendicare (TSX:EXE) has completed a CA$450 million senior unsecured note offering. The company has used the proceeds to refinance existing debt and restructure its credit facilities. This transaction changes Extendicare's capital structure and credit profile. Extendicare, trading at CA$29.59, has seen very strong share price performance, with the stock up 40.4% year to date and 130.5% over the past year. Returns of 9.7% over the past month and 2.7% over the past week suggest investors...
